items.name: Traveler's Pack
items.description: A worn canvas pack with good straps — bedroll, flint, mess kit, fifty small comforts of the road.

items.name: Waterskin
items.description: Boiled and refilled at the last clean spring. Worth more every week the river runs gray.

items.name: Belt Knife
items.description: A plain working blade — more tool than weapon, but it has been both.

items.name: Hemp Rope (30 ft)
items.description: Tarred hemp, knotted every arm's length. The difference between a fall and a climb.

items.name: Resonance Lantern
items.description: Harmonic-made: a phononic crystal that glows when it sings. Light without flame, and it hums louder near active nanite fields.
items.substrateNote: A phononic crystal that glows when it sings; singing is a draw on the lattice and the crystal stays warm.

items.name: Medic's Satchel
items.description: Herb rolls, boiled linen, needle and gut. Valley medicine — patient, practical, proven.

items.name: Healing Draught
items.description: Bitter green tincture from the terrace gardens. Knits small wounds and dulls big ones.

items.name: Dried Rations
items.description: Fish, fruit leather, hard bread. Two days if you're honest with yourself, three if you're not.

items.name: Prism Chip
items.description: A thumb-sized shard of Radiant photonic crystal. Splits any light into telltale spectra — a poor man's Prism Sight.
items.substrateNote: Radiant photonic crystal. A small shard holds a small charge.

items.name: Trade Tokens
items.description: Stamped ceramic rounds honored in Millbrook and grudgingly beyond. The valley's compromise with currency.
